handoff_policy.query_backed_rule: Use the 3 selected query-backed next-batch pages.
handoff_policy.bilingual_pair_rule: Add the opposite-locale counterpart for each selected MBTI type.

current_surface.title: INTP-A 逻辑学家人格：特点、爱情、职业与适合工作 | FermatMind
current_surface.description: 了解 INTP-A 逻辑学家人格的核心特点、优势盲点、爱情关系、职业倾向与适合工作，并通过 MBTI 测试确认自己的类型。

notes: GSC page/query evidence was not available in repo artifacts for the 88-page expansion at generation time.

reference_patterns_used.how_used: Used for section purpose, QA boundary and internal-link pattern only; wording must not be copied verbatim.

title.current: INTP-A 逻辑学家人格：特点、爱情、职业与适合工作 | FermatMind
title.recommended: INTP-A 人格特点：分析、好奇心和独立解题 | FermatMind
title.reason: Align title with type, A/T intent and single-brand suffix pattern from the optimized pilot.

description.current: 了解 INTP-A 逻辑学家人格的核心特点、优势盲点、爱情关系、职业倾向与适合工作，并通过 MBTI 测试确认自己的类型。
description.recommended: 系统了解 INTP-A 的分析、好奇心和独立解题、更偏向稳定自信、决策后持续推进和较少反复确认、优势盲点、工作风格和关系沟通。
description.reason: Make the SERP description answer the page intent while preserving method boundaries.

h1.reason: Keep H1 concise and aligned with the canonical page query.

quick_answer.recommended: INTP-A 是 INTP 核心加上 A 型身份风格的公开人格画像，通常会围绕分析、好奇心和独立解题展开，并呈现更偏向稳定自信、决策后持续推进和较少反复确认。它适合用于自我理解和沟通校准，不适合作为职业或关系结论。
quick_answer.reason: Add an answer-first summary that distinguishes this page without deterministic claims.

faq.question: INTP-A 人格特点是什么？
faq.answer: INTP-A 通常把 INTP 核心与 A 型身份风格结合起来，重点体现在分析、好奇心和独立解题和更偏向稳定自信、决策后持续推进和较少反复确认。
faq.reason: Covers variant meaning, work-style reflection and boundary.

faq.question: INTP-A 适合什么工作环境？
faq.answer: 更适合讨论分析、好奇心和独立解题相关的工作节奏、沟通方式和环境偏好，不能直接推出职业结论或招聘判断。
faq.reason: Covers variant meaning, work-style reflection and boundary.

faq.question: INTP-A 的优势和盲点是什么？
faq.answer: 优势和盲点需要结合更偏向稳定自信、决策后持续推进和较少反复确认看待；同一种风格在不同团队、压力和任务结构中会有不同表现。
faq.reason: Covers variant meaning, work-style reflection and boundary.

faq.question: INTP-A 和另一种 A/T 有什么不同？
faq.answer: 主要看更偏向稳定自信、决策后持续推进和较少反复确认如何影响压力反应、自信稳定度、反馈处理和复盘强度，而不是人格核心是否完全不同。
faq.reason: Covers variant meaning, work-style reflection and boundary.

faq.question: 这个页面可以替代测试结果吗？
faq.answer: 不能。它是公共解释页，适合先理解概念；个人结果仍应以正式测试和完整报告为准。
faq.reason: Covers variant meaning, work-style reflection and boundary.

Connect variant pages to the dedicated A-vs-T comparison page for the same MBTI code.
Connect organic readers to the safe public MBTI test route.
Offer a dimensional-model cross-check without private result routes.

differentiation_notes: Differentiate /zh/personality/intp-a with 分析、好奇心和独立解题 rather than generic MBTI copy.
Variant copy must describe this A/T pole and link to the sibling variant plus comparison page.
Keep A/T as a public identity-style layer; do not state that it is official MBTI.

current_surface.title: INTP-A Logician Personality: Traits, Careers & Relationships | FermatMind
current_surface.description: Explore the INTP-A Logician personality type, including traits, strengths, blind spots, relationships, career fit, and how to confirm your type with an MBTI test.

notes: GSC page/query evidence was not available in repo artifacts for the 88-page expansion at generation time.

reference_patterns_used.how_used: Used for section purpose, QA boundary and internal-link pattern only; wording must not be copied verbatim.

title.current: INTP-A Logician Personality: Traits, Careers & Relationships | FermatMind
title.recommended: INTP-A Meaning: Assertive Logician Traits | FermatMind
title.reason: Align title with type, A/T intent and single-brand suffix pattern from the optimized pilot.

description.current: Explore the INTP-A Logician personality type, including traits, strengths, blind spots, relationships, career fit, and how to confirm your type with an MBTI test.
description.recommended: Explore INTP-A through analysis, curiosity and independent problem solving, steady self-trust and follow-through, strengths, blind spots and relationships.
description.reason: Make the SERP description answer the page intent while preserving method boundaries.

h1.reason: Keep H1 concise and aligned with the canonical page query.

quick_answer.recommended: INTP-A combines the INTP core pattern with an Assertive identity style. In practice, this points to steadier self-trust, post-decision follow-through and less repeated reassurance around analysis, curiosity and independent problem solving. Read it as a public profile, not as a career or relationship verdict.
quick_answer.reason: Add an answer-first summary that distinguishes this page without deterministic claims.

faq.question: What does INTP-A mean?
faq.answer: INTP-A combines the INTP core pattern with an Assertive identity style, especially around analysis, curiosity and independent problem solving and steadier self-trust, post-decision follow-through and less repeated reassurance.
faq.reason: Covers variant meaning, work-style reflection and boundary.

faq.question: What work environment fits INTP-A?
faq.answer: Use the profile to reflect on analysis, curiosity and independent problem solving-related work rhythm, communication and environment fit, not to make a deterministic career decision.
faq.reason: Covers variant meaning, work-style reflection and boundary.

faq.question: What are common INTP-A strengths and blind spots?
faq.answer: Strengths and blind spots depend on context and steadier self-trust, post-decision follow-through and less repeated reassurance; the same style can help or hinder depending on team, pressure and task structure.
faq.reason: Covers variant meaning, work-style reflection and boundary.

faq.question: How is INTP-A different from the other A/T variant?
faq.answer: The practical difference is how steadier self-trust, post-decision follow-through and less repeated reassurance changes stress response, confidence stability, feedback processing and revision intensity.
faq.reason: Covers variant meaning, work-style reflection and boundary.

faq.question: Can this page replace a test result?
faq.answer: No. This is a public explanation page. Personal interpretation should come from a completed test and full report context.
faq.reason: Covers variant meaning, work-style reflection and boundary.
